title: Vision & Discovery Workshop
desc: Project scoping, Design Thinking, introduction to immersive technologies. To clarify an idea before committing, or help a team get up to speed with XR.

title: Prototyping & Development
desc: Trade show demos, interactive museum installations, POCs to validate a concept. A working prototype delivered in a matter of weeks.

title: Innovation Project Lead
desc: Tech Lead or Product Owner for the long haul. Product vision, technology choices, team coordination, delivery. A technical and creative through-line.
